steps.t: Molkha has asked you to slay Fólnith the Pale and Grimdóth the Bitter, siblings of Vethúg Wintermind. One can be found at the top of Flogalith, the ot…
The two elder drakes have been slain! You should report your success to Molkha. Molkha can be found on the frozen lake south-west of Fellgát.
